title: artemisia constricta
intro: Artemisia constricta, also known as sweet sagewort or narrow-leaved sagebrush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Artemisia constricta are said to include relief from colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as protection against insect bites and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in salves and ointments for topical application.
